name: Bayou Carlin Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine vinegar, oil, sugar, onion flakes, salt, dry mustard, celery salt, and TABASCO sauce.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Add shredded cabbage, grated carrot, and chopped green pepper to the mixture.
4. Toss everything together until the vegetables are evenly coated with the dressing.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
6. Before serving, give the slaw a final toss to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
7. Serves 4.
